profile.title: Profile

landing.heroTitle: Walk every street. See your progress.
landing.heroSubtitle: Upload your GPS tracks, watch your map fill up, and join a community of walkers exploring their neighborhoods — completely free.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to track your walks
landing.featureUploadDesc: Upload tracks from Strava, Garmin, or any GPS app and see them on an interactive map.
landing.featureCoverageDesc: See exactly which streets you've walked and track your progress toward covering your whole area.
landing.featureSocialDesc: Follow friends, view their routes on the map, and share your walking achievements.
landing.featureLeaderboardDesc: Friendly competition to motivate more walking and exploring in your community.
landing.communityDesc: No subscriptions. No premium tiers. No ads. Walk Tracker Map is community-driven and open source — built by people who love walking and want to share it with everyone.
landing.stravaSubtitle: Already tracking your walks with Strava? Getting your routes here takes just a few steps.
landing.stravaStep1Desc: Go to strava.com or open the Strava mobile app.
landing.stravaStep2Desc: Navigate to the walk or run you want to export.
landing.stravaStep3Desc: Click the ⋯ menu and select "Export GPX" to download the file.
landing.stravaStep4Desc: Upload the GPX file to Walk Tracker Map and see it on your map.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join the community and start tracking your walks. It's completely free.

errors.NOT_FOUND_ROUTE: Route not found or access denied
errors.NOT_FOUND_ROAD_NETWORK: Road network not loaded yet. Please fetch it first.
errors.EXTERNAL_OVERPASS_API: Road network service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
